task: T-04 LLM Hard-Off / Safe-Run + Missing-TaskId Alert

definitions.NORMAL: All operations permitted. taskId present and valid. Ops Report PASS. No hard-off env vars.
definitions.SAFE_RUN: SAFE_RUN env or param enabled. LLM/external AI blocked. DB writes allowed.
definitions.LLM_HARD_OFF: LLM_HARD_OFF env set. Strongest single-signal hard-off. External AI blocked.
definitions.DEGRADED: Ops Report status is not PASS (e.g. STALE_DATA, MISSING_DATA). LLM blocked, proceed with caution.
definitions.BLOCKED: Hard block: ops guardrail failure OR CRITICAL missing-taskId. No external AI, no DB write.

rules.NONE: taskId exists and is non-empty string.
rules.WARNING: taskId missing but task is dry-run or non-mutating and does not call external AI. Action recommended but not blocking.
rules.CRITICAL: taskId missing AND task may mutate state OR task may call external AI. Task must be blocked.

safety_decision_schema.llmHardOff: boolean — true if any hard-off trigger active
safety_decision_schema.allowDbWrite: boolean — false only in BLOCKED mode

forbidden: Do not use LLM to supplement missing data
Do not continue a mutating task when CRITICAL taskId is missing
Do not embed H001-H012 hypothesis codes in field names
Do not include buy/sell/signal/roi/win_rate/alpha/edge/profit/recommendation/outperform as field keys
